brand.description: Self-hosted feature flags with targeting rules, gradual rollouts, and real-time updates — all in one container.

setup.title: Welcome to ToggleFlow
setup.subtitle: Create your superuser account. This account has full control over users, roles, and all projects.
setup.name: Name

projects.createDescription: Projects group your feature flags and environments.
projects.name: Name
projects.subtitle: Manage your projects and their settings
projects.noProjectDescription: Select a project from the sidebar or create a new one to get started.
projects.editDescription: Change the display name of this project.
projects.emptyDescription: Create your first project to start managing feature flags.
projects.deleteConsequences: All environments, feature flags, and audit history will be permanently removed.
projects.deleteTypePrompt: Type the project name to confirm:

flags.title: Feature Flags
flags.subtitle: Manage flags across all environments
flags.createDescription: Flags are evaluated per environment. Variations define the possible values.
flags.emptyDescription: Create your first flag to start rolling out features gradually.
flags.noEnvironments: No environments — create one to enable this flag.
flags.name: Name

environments.title: Environments
environments.subtitle: Isolate flag states across dev, staging, and production
environments.createDescription: Environments let you run the same flags independently across dev, staging, and prod.
environments.name: Name
environments.emptyDescription: Environments let you control flag states independently across dev, staging, and prod.
environments.editDescription: Update the name, key, description, or protection setting.
environments.protectedDescription: Only admins can toggle flags in this environment.
environments.protectedNote: Protected — only admins can change flag states

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: Track every change to flags and settings
audit.emptyDescription: Every flag change will be recorded here with actor, timestamp, and before/after values.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage team member access and permissions
users.emptyDescription: Invite team members and assign roles to control their access.
users.createDescription: Create an account for a team member and assign their role.
users.name: Name
users.inviteSecurityNote: Send the link and secret via separate channels — the link tells them where to go, the secret verifies their identity.
users.reinviteDescription: Generate a new invite link and secret for {name}. The previous one will no longer work.
users.resetDescription: This will create a one-time reset link and secret for {name}. Share them via separate channels.
users.selfRoleNote: Only another superuser can change your role.
users.editDescription: Update the user's name or role.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Control who has access to this project
members.addDescription: Grant a team member access to this project. Their global role determines what they can do.
members.emptyDescription: Add team members to give them access to this project's flags and environments.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences
settings.appearanceDescription: Choose how ToggleFlow looks for you

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Enter the secret from your reset link, then set a new password.

activate.title: Activate your account
activate.subtitle: Enter the secret from your invitation, then set a password.
